mapper.sql: id, name, code, scene, system_prompt, user_prompt, variables::text AS variables, platform_type, is_builtin, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_prompt_templates WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT FROM ai_prompt_templates WHERE code = #{code} AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_prompt_templates ( name, code, scene, system_prompt, user_prompt, variables, platform_type, is_builtin, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{code}, #{scene}, #{systemPrompt}, #{userPrompt}, #{variables}::jsonb, #{platformType}, #{isBuiltin}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_prompt_templates SET del_flag = '1', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
